        with open(filename, 'w') as outfile:

        exec(code)

findings.code_snippet:
r = requests.post(
        f"http://{release_name}-grafana/api/v1/provisioning/alert-rules",
        auth=("admin", "admin"),
        json={
            "title": "TEST-API_1",
            "ruleGroup": "API",
            "folderUID": folder_uid,
            "noDataState": "OK",
            "execErrState": "OK",
            "for": "5m",
            "orgId": 1,
            "uid": "",
            "condition": "B",
            "annotations": {"summary": "test_api_1"},
            "labels": {"API": "test1"},
            "data": [
                {
                    "refId": "A",
                    "queryType": "",
                    "relativeTimeRange": {"from": 600, "to": 0},
                    "datasourceUid": "XXXXXXXXX-XXXXXXXXX-XXXXXXXXXX",
                    "model": {
                        "expr": "up",
                        "hide": False,
                        "intervalMs": 1000,
                        "maxDataPoints": 43200,
                        "refId": "A",
                    },
                },
                {
                    "refId": "B",
                    "queryType": "",
                    "relativeTimeRange": {"from": 0, "to": 0},
                    "datasourceUid": "-100",
                    "model": {
                        "conditions": [
                            {
                                "evaluator": {"params": [6], "type": "gt"},
                                "operator": {"type": "and"},
                                "query": {"params": ["A"]},
                                "reducer": {"params": [], "type": "last"},
                                "type": "query",
                            }
                        ],
                        "datasource": {"type": "__expr__", "uid": "-100"},
                        "hide": False,
                        "intervalMs": 1000,
                        "maxDataPoints": 43200,
                        "refId": "B",
                        "type": "classic_conditions",
                    },
                },
            ],
        },
    )
